task: Identify the top 6 direct competitors to Fauna & Flora Botanicals (premium tallow beard care and ancestral skincare). Search for: 1) Tallow-based skincare brands (Toups & Co, Vintage Tradition, FATCO, Buffalo Gal), 2) Premium natural beard care brands (Beardbrand, Honest Amish), 3) Ancestral/wisdom-based grooming brands. For each competitor, provide: name, website URL, 2-3 key products, and their main differentiator. Keep response concise and structured.

Compare product offerings from the top 6 competitors identified. For each: list hero products, price points, key ingredients they emphasize (tallow, botanicals, etc.), and any bundle offerings. Note any gaps or opportunities where Fauna & Flora could differentiate. Keep to bullet points.

Review the digital presence of 4-5 key competitors. For each, note: website quality, social media platforms used, email signup tactics, and any content marketing (blogs, guides). Identify 3 specific digital tactics that appear effective that FFB could consider adopting.

Based on all previous research in memory, create 5-7 actionable strategic recommendations for Fauna & Flora Botanicals. Format as: 1) Quick competitive summary (2-3 sentences), 2) Top 3 competitor threats, 3) Top 3 opportunities for FFB, 4) 5-7 prioritized recommendations with brief rationale for each.
